task_completion.description: Verify that the UpdraftPlus WordPress Backup Plugin is installed and activated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WordPress Plugins page shows 'UpdraftPlus - Backup/Restore' as active, or the UpdraftPlus settings dashboard is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the file backup schedule is set to daily with a retention of 4.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the UpdraftPlus Settings tab, 'Files backup schedule' is set to 'Daily' and the 'retain this many scheduled backups' input is set to '4'.

task_completion.description: Verify the database backup schedule is set to daily with a retention of 4.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the UpdraftPlus Settings tab, 'Database backup schedule' is set to 'Daily' and the 'retain this many scheduled backups' input is set to '4'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'temp-video-renders' directory is excluded from the uploads backup.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the UpdraftPlus Settings tab, under 'Include in files backup', the exclusion text box for 'Uploads' contains 'temp-video-renders'.

task_completion.description: Verify an initial manual backup of both files and the database was executed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Backup Now' modal or progress bar is visible showing the backup process running with both files and database selected, or a success message indicating the backup completed.

task_completion.description: Verify the backup completed successfully and appears in the backup history.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Existing backups' tab shows a completed backup entry with the current date, containing icons/buttons for both Database and Files. If backup size is visible, it should be under 20MB.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the WordPress web GUI to configure the plugin.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the WordPress admin dashboard in a web browser, not terminal commands or WP-CLI.

integrity.description: Verify the settings were actually saved.
integrity.visual_evidence: A 'Settings saved' notification is visible at the top of the UpdraftPlus settings page, or the agent is shown clicking the 'Save Changes' button at the bottom.

integrity.description: Verify the backup history is genuine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The backup history shows a realistic timestamp matching the system clock, and the UI elements for the backup (Restore, Delete, View Log buttons) are properly rendered.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected backup schedule is 'daily' with a retention of '4' for both files and database. The folder 'temp-video-renders' must be explicitly excluded from the uploads backup. A successful exclusion will result in a backup size of less than 20MB (20971520 bytes), as a 50MB dummy file is present in the excluded folder. Verify these exact values in the UpdraftPlus settings and backup history.
